allow: Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax OK'\)")
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import streamlit, pandas; print\('streamlit', streamlit.__version__, '| pandas', pandas.__version__\)")
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import transformers, torch; print\('transformers', transformers.__version__\); print\('torch', torch.__version__\)")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import transformers, torch; print\('transformers', transformers.__version__\); print\('torch', torch.__version__\)")
